message:
test: extend CI gate with waiver lifecycle validation and expand provider coverage

Updates to existing test infrastructure:

ci_full_suite_gate.rs:
- Add waiver lifecycle infrastructure: Waiver struct, WaiverValidation,
  and WaiverAuditReport types for parsing and validating suite_classification
  waiver entries against required fields and expiry dates
- Generate waiver_audit.json artifact alongside gate verdicts
- Add preflight lane verdict generation with schema versioning
- Add certification dossier aggregation from sub-gate results
- Include replay bundle generation with correlation IDs and evidence links
- Clippy lint suppressions (doc_markdown, too_many_lines) for test code

provider_native_contract.rs:
- Expand contract assertions for additional provider response fields
- Add timeout and error classification contract tests

provider_session_coverage.rs:
- Add coverage tracking for VCR-recorded vs live provider sessions
- Expand session lifecycle assertions (create, resume, destroy paths)

rpc_edge_cases.rs:
- Add edge cases for malformed provider responses and partial failures

suite_classification.toml:
- Add VCR mode classifications for existing and new test suites
- Expand risk tier assignments and estimated durations
- Add waiver template entries for reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -200,3 +218,36 @@ files = [
 # repro = "cargo test example_flaky_test -- --nocapture"
 # reason = "Intermittent timeout on CI due to thread scheduling variance"
 # remove_when = "Two consecutive green CI runs for this test on Linux/macOS/Windows"
+
+# ─── Waivers: temporary CI gate bypasses with enforced lifecycle ─────────
+#
+# Waivers allow a specific CI gate to be temporarily bypassed. Every waiver
+# MUST have a linked bead, owner, expiry, and measurable removal plan.
+# Expired waivers fail CI — they must be renewed or the underlying issue fixed.
+#
+# Each entry: [waiver.<gate_id>]
+#   gate_id      = Must match a SubGate.id in ci_full_suite_gate.rs
+#   owner        = "<AgentName or person responsible for removal>"
+#   created      = "YYYY-MM-DD"
+#   expires      = "YYYY-MM-DD"   (max 30 days from created)
+#   bead         = "bd-XXXX"      (linked issue tracking the fix)
+#   reason       = "<why this gate is waived>"
+#   scope        = "full" | "preflight" | "both"  (which lane is affected)
+#   remove_when  = "<objective measurable condition for removing waiver>"
+#
+# Rules:
+#   - Max waiver duration: 30 days (must renew or fix)
+#   - Expired waivers cause CI failure (waiver_lifecycle gate)
+#   - Each waiver must have ALL required fields
+#   - Waivers expiring within 3 days trigger warnings
+#   - Only gates listed in ci_full_suite_gate.rs can be waived
+#
+# Example:
+# [waiver.ext_must_pass]
+# owner = "TopazForest"
+# created = "2026-02-10"
+# expires = "2026-02-24"
+# bead = "bd-1f42.4.4"
+# reason = "Extension conformance suite blocked by upstream QuickJS bug"
+# scope = "both"
+# remove_when = "QuickJS bug fix merged and all 208 extensions pass"
